title: Survival Expansion
description: [1.21] Simple Modpack to slightly enhance the vanilla experience.
body:
# THIS PROJECT WAS ABANDONED AND WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY FURTHER UPDATES.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ce5aff8f2ba8f287a5199c853c315082b179f3.png)
# ABOUT
New Minecraft version with a gentle touch of Vanilla+ mods, performance boosters and QOL improvements while keeping the vanilla feeling.
![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
This modpack is focused on Vanilla+ features such as a subtle overhaul of vanilla biomes, new furniture, improving storage, adding backpacks, and even enderite, which is slightly better than netherite. The game also looks way better with added shaders, animated textures and mobs, ambient sounds, footsteps, and various HUD elements including a minimap.

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft)
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm)
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge)
* [Survival Expansion](https://modrinth.com/modpack/survival-expansion)
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric)

# CREDITS
Resourcepack by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
